name: LockBit 2.0
description: [LockBit 2.0](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1199) is an affiliate-based Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) that has been in use since at least June 2021 as the successor to LockBit Ransomware. [LockBit 2.0](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1199) has versions capable of infecting Windows and VMware ESXi virtual machines, and has been observed targeting multiple industry verticals globally.(Citat
